Skip to contents
uv 0.3.0
  • Reference

Initialise a uv project

Source: R/uv-init.R
init.Rd

Create a new Python project using uv.

Usage

init(
  name = NULL,
  type = c("app", "package", "library"),
  backend = NULL,
  bare = FALSE,
  vcs = TRUE,
  path = ".",
  verbose = TRUE
)

Arguments

name

Optional project directory name. If NULL, initialise the current directory.

type

Project type: "app", "package", or "library".

backend

Optional build backend (e.g. "uv_build", "hatchling", "maturin", "scikit-build-core").

bare

Logical; create a minimal project structure.

vcs

Logical; initialise version control (git).

path

Directory in which to create the project.

verbose

Whether to print messages.

Value

Invisibly returns NULL. Called for its side effects.

Examples

withr::local_tempdir() |>
  withr::with_dir({

    init("myapp")
    fs::dir_ls("myapp")

    init("mylib", type = "library")
    fs::dir_ls("mylib")

    init("pkg", type = "package", backend = "maturin")
    fs::dir_ls("pkg")
  })
#> Error: ! command is not a string (length 1 character)
